message:
fix(core): propagate NULL through NOT operator in HAVING evaluation

The unary NOT operator in the HAVING clause evaluator did not handle
NULL inputs — NOT NULL should yield NULL per SQL three-valued logic,
but was instead treating NULL as falsy and returning 1. This is the
same pattern already fixed for AND/OR/comparison operators in the
previous commit, applied here to complete NULL propagation coverage
in HAVING expressions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
